title: Extracting Email Addresses
scenario: Write a prompt to extract email addresses from a given text, ignoring unrelated words. The input text contains email addresses in various formats, such as 'john@example.com' or 'john.doe@company.com'. The output should be a list of extracted email addresses. For example, the input text 'Contact us at john@example.com or john.doe@company.com' would be output as ['john@example.com', 'john.doe@company.com']
constraints: Must use a list to separate email addresses

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output adheres to the given constraints.
Check if the output is a valid list of email addresses.
Judge if the output correctly extracts email addresses in various formats.
